title: 2023 Census products and services | Stats NZ
content:
## 2023 Census products and services
07 November 2024, 10:45am
This page provides information on how 2023 Census data is being released and the services to support access and use of it.
Following consultation on the mix of products and services for this census, some are the same as provided in previous censuses, and others improved to better meet the needs of census customers and to reflect changes in technology.
2023 Census product and release finder provides the detail of every data product, paper, and information release.
2023 Census release schedule provides the plan for releasing census data.
Engagement about 2023 Census data sets out opportunities to learn more about 2023 Census products and services.
Download the PDF version of 2023 Census products and services, or read it online.
- 2023 Census Products and Services Guide Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 3.6 MB

### 2023 Census Products and Services Guide
Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 3.6 MB

Products and services targeted to those with intermediate data capabilities or higher

Follow us on Facebook , LinkedIn , X , Instagram , and YouTube for census updates.
Follow us on Facebook , LinkedIn , X , Instagram , and YouTube for census updates.

Grasp the insights from the data through digital and printable posters.

Keep up to date with news and announcements about the census.

Explore census data through interactive maps.
Place and ethnic group summaries
Place and ethnic group summaries
View simple graphs and tables of data for local communities and ethnic groups about topics including population, work, and housing.
View simple graphs and tables of data for local communities and ethnic groups about topics including population, work, and housing.
Browse iwi data tailored specifically for iwi by iwi, provided by Te Kāhui Raraunga Charitable Trust on behalf of the Data Iwi Leaders Group.
Browse iwi data tailored specifically for iwi by iwi, provided by Te Kāhui Raraunga Charitable Trust on behalf of the Data Iwi Leaders Group.

See where and how people travel to and from work and education.

Explore selected topics in detail through words, graphs, maps, and tables.
Aotearoa Data Explorer
Aotearoa Data Explorer
Customise, view, and download detailed data tables as Excel or CSV files or through an API (application programming interface).
Customise, view, and download detailed data tables as Excel or CSV files or through an API (application programming interface).

Read the key facts about newly released data and access links to detailed tables.
Download data files from Datafinder and ArcGIS Online for your geographic information system (GIS).
Download data files from Datafinder and ArcGIS Online for your geographic information system (GIS).
Apply for access to detailed census datasets and the Integrated Data Infrastructure (IDI) for your next research project.
